$MTE

Mix To Earn

Ultimate privacy and advanced transaction solutions.

Launch dApp

MixToEarn Protocol

Redefining Blockchain Privacy by leveraging an advanced zkSNARKs-based privacy mixer, ensuring transaction verifiability, and uniquely offering an "Earn and Anonymize" feature.

100% Revenue Share

Heightened Privacy

Vitalik's Vision

Inspired by Vitalik's progressive insights into the crypto domain, we bring forth a novel non-custodial, barrier-free mixer. This unique system connects withdrawals to designated deposit groups, allowing users the autonomy to distance themselves from potentially compromised funds. At its heart, robust zero-knowledge proofs ensure utmost privacy.

Zero-Knowledge Proof

$MTE Token

The $MTE token serves as the driving force of the MixToEarn ecosystem. With a total supply of 1 billion tokens, it plays a pivotal role in the platform’s functionality and growth.

Trading (buy/sell) 5% tax is applied to both buy and sell transactions, with the proceeds directed towards development and marketing activities. This tax can only be adjusted to lower values in the future based on the needs of the project, allowing for flexibility.

Learn more about $MTE reading our whitepaper

Rewarding Mechanism

The rewarding mechanism ensures that users who stay in the pool for at least 48 hours receive rewards, The 48-hour period starts individually for each user based on their deposit timestamp.

100% fee back to users

Relayer Revenue Share

If you hold 20,000 MTE tokens or more, you're eligible to become a relayer and earn 100% of the revenue from transaction processing.

Relayers allow users to:

Process withdrawals without requiring pre-funding of their withdrawal accounts, ensuring privacy even when withdrawing to empty wallets.

Relayers act as intermediaries and handle the entire withdrawal process, covering transaction fees by deducting them directly from the transferred amount. Additionally, they charge an extra fee for providing their services.

Withdrawal allowance for relayers

Intermediaries of withdrawal process

Become a Relayer

Tax Revenue Share

A percentage of the generated trading tax on the $MTE token is allocated to a staking rewards pool. MTE holders have the opportunity to stake their tokens in the protocol and earn rewards funded by this percentage of tax.

Non-custodial, barrier-free mixer

Stake $MTE (Soon)

DAO Governance

As a holder of the MTE token, you can draft proposals on various matters, whether it's suggesting new features, proposing changes to the existing protocol, or initiating community driven projects.

MTE Dao (Soon)

Layer #1 (Testnet):

Experience full spectrum of blockchain

features with our non-custodial wallet. (Executed)

Layer #2 (Mainnet):

Mixer pools, sub-sets customizing and

integrating the reward system. (Deployment-Ready)

Layer #3 (Mainnet):

Relayer implementation.

(Deployment-Ready)

Layer #4 (Mainnet):

Telegram bot release.

(Deployment-Ready)

Layer #5 (Mainnet):

DAO Governance and Tax revenue

share implementation (In progress)

As we continue to move forward, it’s important to note that more layers are currently under

development and testing, promising even more exciting developments for

MixToEarn Protocol and $MTE holders.

Progression

We’ve structured our development process into distinct layers, each serving a

crucial role in achieving our goals. The use of ‘layers’ signifies the step-by-step

approach we’ve taken to ensure the successful implementation of our protocol.
